backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a marketplace with user profiles, items, shopping carts, messaging, wands, magic, and friendship management using role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features for MyWandsPage, AddWandForm, FriendsPage, FriendWandsPage, and Layout navigation updates with associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components and pages including wand management, friendship features, marketplace functionality, and styling with wand-themed design system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space for wand-themed UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Harry Potter Marketplace application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for wands, friends, and settings pages, plus profile setup modal and theme provider integration.
Empty file placeholder for add-to-cart button component.
frontend/src/components/AddWandForm.tsx: Form component for creating new wands with name input validation, submission handling via useCreateWand mutation, and wand-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/CartIcon.tsx: Empty file placeholder for shopping cart icon component.
frontend/src/components/ContactSellerBut: Empty file placeholder for contact seller button component.
frontend/src/components/CreateListingFor: Empty file placeholder for marketplace listing creation form component.
frontend/src/components/EditWandForm.tsx: Form component for editing existing wand names with validation, update mutation handling, and cancel functionality with wand-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/FilterPanel.tsx: Empty file placeholder for marketplace item filter panel component.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Empty file placeholder for hero banner component.
frontend/src/components/ItemCard.tsx: Empty file placeholder for marketplace item card component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component providing navigation header with logo, authenticated navigation links (My Wands, Friends, Settings), user avatar display, and login/logout functionality using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePictureUp: Profile picture upload component that handles image file selection, validation (type and 5MB size limit), conversion to ExternalBlob with upload progress tracking, and removal functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for initial user profile setup, collecting name (required), email (optional), and profile picture, then saving via useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/UserAvatar.tsx: Avatar component displaying user profile pictures from ExternalBlob with three size variants (small/medium/large) and fallback to User icon when no image is provided.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling anonymous and authenticated actors, and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profiles (get/save caller profile, get public profile), wand management (CRUD operations), and friendship management (list/add/remove friends) with toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles defining a magical wand-themed color palette (oak, ebony, mahogany, starlight) using OKLCH color space, Tailwind configuration, and custom fonts (Cinzel for headings, Inter for body).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccountSettingsPage.t: Page for authenticated users to view and edit their profile information including name, email, and profile picture upload.
frontend/src/pages/BrowsePage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for browse functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for shopping cart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for checkout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ConversationPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for conversation/messaging functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CreateListingPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for creating marketplace listings.
frontend/src/pages/FriendsPage.tsx: Manages friend connections with functionality to send/accept/reject friend requests and view confirmed friends' wand collections.
frontend/src/pages/FriendWandsPage.tsx: Displays a friend's wand collection with profile information, showing a grid of wands with navigation back to friends list.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for inbox/messages functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ItemDetailPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for item detail view.
frontend/src/pages/MyListingsPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for managing user's marketplace listings.
frontend/src/pages/MyWandsPage.tsx: Main page for authenticated users to view, add, edit, and delete wands in their personal collection with a hero banner.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for user profile display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and session storage, supporting both regular and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme including fantasy-themed colors (oak, ebony, mahogany, starlight), custom fonts (Cinzel serif, Inter sans), and mystical shadow effects.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a wand collection app with user authentication, friend connections, and wand cataloging features. Contains architectural notes, existing features from a Harry Potter marketplace implementation, and image requirements for wand-themed assets.
